message:
test(uds): expand from 42 to 82 tests for Unix domain socket wrappers (wa-2rwlw)

Added 40 tests covering: timeout get/set/clear, accept addr, stream
survival after listener drop, write after peer drop, oversized buffer
reads, partial reads, read_exact failure, BufReader/BufWriter wrapping,
bytes iterator, Read::take, write_vectored, Read::chain, concurrent
multi-client accept, bidirectional exchange, shutdown variants, fd
consistency, take_error, connect error kinds, and more.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
